shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' .agents/skills/mempal-memory/SKILL.md && printf '\\n--- status ---\\n' && git status --short && printf '\\n--- files ---\\n' && rg --files src test | head -80"
/bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "downshift useCombobox getItemProps onMouseDown preventDownshiftDefault input focus flicker" --json --top-k 5'
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,120p' src/utils.js && sed -n '1,180p' src/hooks/useCombobox/testUtils.js && rg -n \"getItemProps\\(|onMouseDown\" src/hooks/useCombobox README.md docs test | head -100"

/bin/bash -lc "git log --all -S'itemHandleMouseDown' --oneline -- src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js src/hooks/useSelect/index.js && git log --all -S'onMouseDown: callAllEventHandlers' --oneline -- src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js src/hooks/useSelect/index.js && sed -n '100,190p' src/__tests__/downshift.get-item-props.js"

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"itemHandleMouseDown|onMouseDown\" src/downshift.js src/hooks/useSelect/index.js src/hooks/useMultipleSelection/index.js src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js src/__tests__ | head -100 && sed -n '180,280p' src/hooks/useSelect/index.js"
/bin/bash -lc 'git diff --check && git diff -- src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js && git status --short'
/bin/bash -lc 'npx prettier --write src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js && git diff --check && git diff --stat && git diff -- src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js'
/bin/bash -lc 'npx kcd-scripts test --no-watch src/hooks/useCombobox/__tests__/getItemProps.test.js && npx prettier --check src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js && git status --short'

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
